So instead of a fixed function, I want to abstract it to a post processing in PyLate that can be user defined through a function that

title: Twitter @doesdatmaksense
summary:
modernBERT + late chunking as an embedding model for long documents where the context is spread across the full document

i think it will work great and along with flash-attention it will be quite fast too, need to experiment though

title: Twitter @antoine_chaffin
summary:
Late chunking is another type of pooling, but using spatial information rather than similarity as in our proposed pooling method

We still need to figure out how to compromise between keeping all the tokens and only one and it might even need to be considered during training https://t.co/LmooKTqsTr
